title: Best Income Stocks to Buy for April 25th

title: Vistra: A Solid Bet To Outperform In A Recession
text: In this article, we will evaluate how Vistra can help protect your portfolio in the event of a recession. Recessions usually bring with them low energy prices, and reduced discretionary spending. However, in today's modern age, demand for electricity is relatively inelastic.

title: Vistra Is Becoming A Nuclear Energy Powerhouse
text: VST recently announced the acquisition of Energy Harbor, an Ohio-based owner/operator of nuclear power plants. The "Inflation Reduction Act" gives production tax credits to nuclear power producers, which provides 10 years of benefits to nuclear plants.

title: Strong Mid-Cap Insider Buys: Q1 2023
text: Today, we provide you the first quarter update in our recurring series based on firms that have enjoyed unusual insider interest during the first quarter of the year. We stand behind our belief that insiders supply the market with high-quality investment information each time they decide to trade their own company's shares on the open market.
